label: Ritual outcome comp (ritual target defs)
description: Applies qualityOffset when the ritual target Thing matches one of the specified defs (or any altar, or auto-applies in classic mode).

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown in the ritual quality breakdown UI.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Quality offset applied when the target matches one of the defs.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: Optional SimpleCurve; not typically used by this variant.

expectedThingLabelTip.label: Expected thing label tip
expectedThingLabelTip.description: Label used in the tooltip describing what target object is expected for this ritual.

defs.label: Defs
defs.description: List of ThingDefs that the ritual target must match for this comp to apply.

allowAltars.label: Allow altars
allowAltars.description: If true, any altar Thing (isAltar=true) also satisfies this comp regardless of the defs list.

autoPoweredNeedsToBeOn.label: Auto powered needs to be on
autoPoweredNeedsToBeOn.description: If true, issues a blocking warning when the target has an AutoPowered comp and it is not powered on.

autoApplyInClassicMode.label: Auto apply in classic mode
autoApplyInClassicMode.description: If true, this comp always applies in classic (no ideo) mode regardless of the target.
